'''Fitch''' was a short, stout [[Ferroan]] shipbuilder living on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]] he helped complete the [[Sekotan Personal Starship|Zonama Sekotan ship]], ''[[Jabitha]]'', for [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], whom he was responsible for teaching the basic information needed to pilot the ship.
